name: Attacked From Within

spell.name: Attacked From Within
spell.access: Rivethun priests and shamans or those who have a close relationship with such individuals.
spell.critical_success: The target takes no damage, with a brief sensation of pain followed by a pleasant memory.
spell.success: The target takes half damage and is frightened 1.
spell.failure: The target takes full damage and is frightened 2.
spell.critical_failure: The target takes double damage and is frightened 2 and off-guard for 1 round.

text: You assert your power over the target’s own spirit as you reach deep into its soul in order to discover a moment of excruciating anguish, debilitating humiliation, or abject despair. The target takes 12d8 spirit damage and must attempt a Will save.
